meaning: 德韦达郡[英国威尔士郡名]
examples: For a local bus timetable, contact Dyfed County Council.
In April, police in the Welsh town of Dyfed-Powys revealed that 14 UFO sightings had been reported in the past five years - as well as 26 ghosts, 11 witches, two zombies and two vampires.
Dyfed-Powys Police are appealing for anyone who has any information to get in touch.
Dyfed-Powys Police is investigating allegations of illegal buying and reselling of vehicles in south Wales.
Dyfed-Powys Police said the woman who died was a passenger in the car, a Ford Ka.
